description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Build that runs on push to master, on pull requests to master, and on workflow dispatch. The workflow has two jobs: build-ubuntu and build-windows. The build-ubuntu job runs on multiple Ubuntu environments with different configurations, installing dependencies, configuring CMake, and building AntiMicroX. The build-windows job runs on Windows Server 2019 with different configurations, installing dependencies, and building AntiMicroX.
